content.content:
1	"""LINE platform adapter.
2	
3	Receives LINE webhook events via aiohttp and sends replies/push messages
4	through the LINE Messaging API.
5	"""
6	
7	from __future__ import annotations
8	
9	import base64
10	import hashlib
11	import hmac
12	import json
13	import logging
14	import time
15	from typing import Any, Dict, Optional
16	
17	import httpx
18	
19	try:
20	    from aiohttp import web
21	
22	    AIOHTTP_AVAILABLE = True
23	except ImportError:
24	    AIOHTTP_AVAILABLE = False
25	    web = None  # type: ignore[assignment]
26	
27	from gateway.config import Platform, PlatformConfig
28	from gateway.platforms.base import BasePlatformAdapter, MessageEvent, MessageType, SendResult
29	
30	logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)
31	
32	DEFAULT_HOST = "0.0.0.0"
33	DEFAULT_PORT = 8650
34	LINE_API_BASE = "https://api.line.me/v2/bot/message"
35	
36	
37	def check_line_requirements() -> bool:
38	    return AIOHTTP_AVAILABLE
39	
40	
41	class LineAdapter(BasePlatformAdapter):
42	    """LINE Messaging API adapter."""
43	
44	    MAX_MESSAGE_LENGTH = 5000
45	
46	    def __init__(self, config: PlatformConfig):
47	        super().__init__(config, Platform.LINE)
48	        self._host = str(config.extra.get("host", DEFAULT_HOST))
49	        self._port = int(config.extra.get("port", DEFAULT_PORT))
50	        self._channel_secret = str(config.extra.get("channel_secret", ""))
51	        self._channel_access_token = config.token or ""
52	        self._runner = None
53	        # Keep latest replyToken for short-lived direct replies per chat.
54	        self._reply_tokens: Dict[str, tuple[str, float]] = {}
55	
56	    async def connect(self) -> bool:
57	        if not self._channel_secret or not self._channel_access_token:
58	            logger.warning("LINE: missing LINE_CHANNEL_SECRET or LINE_CHANNEL_ACCESS_TOKEN")
59	            return False
60	        app = web.Application()
61	        app.router.add_get("/line/health", self._handle_health)
62	        app.router.add_post("/line/webhook", self._handle_webhook)
63	
64	        self._runner = web.AppRunner(app)
65	        await self._runner.setup()
66	        site = web.TCPSite(self._runner, self._host, self._port)
67	        await site.start()
68	        self._mark_connected()
69	        logger.info("[line] Listening on %s:%d (/line/webhook)", self._host, self._port)
70	        return True
71	
72	    async def disconnect(self) -> None:
73	        if self._runner:
74	            await self._runner.cleanup()
75	            self._runner = None
76	        self._mark_disconnected()
77	        logger.info("[line] Disconnected")
78	
79	    async def send(
80	        self,
81	        chat_id: str,
82	        content: str,
83	        reply_to: Optional[str] = None,
84	        metadata: Optional[Dict[str, Any]] = None,
85	    ) -> SendResult:
86	        chunks = self.truncate_message(content, self.MAX_MESSAGE_LENGTH)
87	        for chunk in chunks:
88	            result = await self._send_one(chat_id=chat_id, content=chunk)
89	            if not result.success:
90	                return result
91	        return SendResult(success=True)
92	
93	    async def _send_one(self, chat_id: str, content: str) -> SendResult:
94	        headers = {
95	            "Authorization": f"Bearer {self._channel_access_token}",
96	            "Content-Type": "application/json",
97	        }
98	        now = time.time()
99	        reply_payload = self._reply_tokens.get(chat_id)
100	        # LINE replyToken is short-lived, best-effort under 50 sec.
